bucket.description: The name of the S3 bucket where the objects are stored.

delimiter.description: A character used to group keys when listing objects, like a directory separator.

encoding_type.description: Specifies the encoding method to be applied to the object keys in the response.

fetch_owner.description: A boolean value that indicates whether to include the owner field in the response.

max_keys.description: The maximum number of keys to return in the response.

prefix.description: Limits the response to keys that begin with the specified prefix.

start_after.description: Specifies the key to start with when listing objects in a bucket.
